mapper.select: SELECT id, withdraw_no, merchant_no, merchant_name, withdraw_amount, actual_amount, fee_amount, withdraw_type, withdraw_status, bank_name, bank_account, account_name, audit_user, audit_time, audit_remark, transfer_no, transfer_channel, channel_transfer_no, transfer_time, transfer_fail_reason, transfer_retry_count, next_transfer_retry_time, arrive_time, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM merchant_withdraw WHERE deleted = 0 AND merchant_no = #{merchantNo} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, withdraw_no, merchant_no, merchant_name, withdraw_amount, actual_amount, fee_amount, withdraw_type, withdraw_status, bank_name, bank_account, account_name, audit_user, audit_time, audit_remark, transfer_no, transfer_channel, channel_transfer_no, transfer_time, transfer_fail_reason, transfer_retry_count, next_transfer_retry_time, arrive_time, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM merchant_withdraw WHERE deleted = 0 AND withdraw_no = #{withdrawNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actual_settle_amount), 0) FROM settlement_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND merchant_no = #{merchantNo} AND settle_status = 2
